scripts.test: pnpm run -r test # ⚠️ tichu-web will run tests in watch mode when not on CI
scripts.lint: pnpm run -r build && pnpm --filter tichu-web run lint # ⚠️ eslint not currently setup for other packages ⚠️pre-build as a workaround while we figure out module stuff (See #829)
scripts.web-build-storybook: pnpm --filter tichu-client-ts-lib run build && pnpm --filter tichu-web run build-storybook
scripts.prettier-check-all: prettier --check .. # not using --workspaces here so we also check the root
scripts.prettier-fix-all: prettier --write .. # not using --workspaces here so we also check the root
